description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after a German Shepherd dog, featuring large, round, shiny eyes and a prominent black nose. Its fur is rendered in a mix of tan, black, and brown colors, with the tan areas highlighting the face, chest, and paws, while the back and sides are predominantly dark. The ears are upright and pointed, with lighter inner sections and darker outer edges. The toy's body is compact and slightly chubby, with short legs tucked underneath, giving it a sitting posture. The surface appears soft and fuzzy, typical of synthetic plush toys, and the overall appearance is endearing and child-friendly. No visible clothing or accessories are present, and the toy is free of any branding or logos.
description: A plush German Shepherd dog stuffed toy with large shiny eyes, tan and black fur, and a soft, fuzzy surface in a sitting posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's face with large eyes, upright ears, and a prominent nose, highlighting its expressive features.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the profile of the head, the upright ear, and the compact body with the front paw visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view displays the rounded head, both ears, and the back, emphasizing the dark fur on the upper body.
description_view_3: Angled rear view shows the back, tail, and side of the head, with the tan and black fur pattern visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with large, round, shiny eyes and a small, closed mouth. The eyes give the toy a wide-eyed, endearing look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with front legs tucked under the body and head facing forward, ears perked up.
